recommendations.title: Five Minutes of Heaven
recommendations.overview: The story of former Ulster Volunteer Force member Alistair Little. Twenty-five years after Little killed Joe Griffin's brother, the media arrange an auspicious meeting between the two.

recommendations.title: 13 Minutes
recommendations.overview: The breathtaking story of a man who nearly would have changed the world. In 1939, when Hitler tricked millions of people at the height of his power, radical Georg Elser — disparaged as an assassin — is one of the greatest resistance fighters.

recommendations.title: The Experiment
recommendations.overview: 20 volunteers agree to take part in a seemingly well-paid experiment advertised by the university. It is supposed to be about aggressive behavior in an artificial prison situation. A journalist senses a story behind the ad and smuggles himself in amo

recommendations.title: Downfall
recommendations.overview: In April of 1945, Germany stands at the brink of defeat with the Russian Army closing in from the east and the Allied Expeditionary Force attacking from the west. In Berlin, capital of the Third Reich, Adolf Hitler proclaims that Germany will still a

recommendations.title: The Invasion
recommendations.overview: Washington, D.C. psychologist Carol Bennell and her colleague Dr. Ben Driscoll are the only two people on Earth who are aware of an epidemic running rampant through the city. They discover an alien virus aboard a crashed space shuttle that transforms

recommendations.title: Raazi
recommendations.overview: An Indian spy is married to a Pakistani military officer during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

recommendations.title: Diana: In Her Own Words
recommendations.overview: Using home videos recorded by her voice coach, Diana takes us through the story of her life.

recommendations.title: My Beautiful Laundrette
recommendations.overview: A young Pakistani Briton manages a rundown laundrette with his lover while dealing with tension in his family, the local Pakistani community, and a persistent mob of skinheads.

recommendations.title: Forgotten Love
recommendations.overview: A once-respected surgeon who's lost his family and his memory gets a chance at redemption when he reconnects with someone from his forgotten past.

recommendations.title: Jodhaa Akbar
recommendations.overview: A sixteenth century love story about a marriage of alliance that gave birth to true love between a Mughal emperor and a Rajput princess.
